nodes.label: P2.2 synth — depth-slope headline (4/4 reach >=0)
nodes.rationale: All four negative-type bars are positive (random +0.0034, hard-oracle +0.0076, hard-proto +0.0042, hard-unsup +0.0070) -- the synth mirror of the CIFAR 0/4 chart, proving the objective mechanism works exactly where real class clusters exist, which is what makes the CIFAR null decisive rather than a broken test.
